description:
Grow your YouTube channel with BrandLytics at: https://brandlytics.ai

✎ Get free access to our vault of PDF summaries for every YouTube video here: https://believe.evancarmichael.com/the-vault

✎ Check out my NEWEST video: https://goo.gl/E0eE6m

✎ If you are waiting for the perfect time to start your YouTube channel, you are actually just avoiding the hard work. Many people think the platform is too crowded, but there is always room for a real person who is willing to share their true struggles. In this video, I talk about how I had to make 350 videos before I could even watch myself on camera without feeling embarrassed. It took me five long years to get just a few thousand subscribers, but I never quit because I wanted to help entrepreneurs like you. This video features advice from experts like James Dyson and insights from the Harvard Business Review to show you that your voice matters even if you are just starting out.

✎ You need to stop chasing viral trends and start serving your audience of one by talking directly to the person you were five or ten years ago. When you focus on helping just one person solve a deep pain, your content becomes emotional and powerful instead of boring and generic. Even if you only get 10 views today, you should treat those 10 people with extreme respect as if they were standing right in your living room. I explain why loyalty is more important than random clicks and how you can turn your channel into a business machine by building real relationships. You will learn how to use interviews to connect with big leaders and create a bridge to your own success without needing a million followers.

✎ To win on YouTube today, you must master the satisfaction engine and give people the answers they want in the very first sentence. Stop trying to be perfect because perfectionism is just a shield that keeps you from being your authentic self. I share how tools like Brand Litics can help you test your thumbnails and how AI can help you reach people in other countries without losing your soul. You have to protect your belief every day by unfollowing people who drain your energy and listening to powerful voices like Steve Jobs or Michael Jordan. If you commit to being consistent and making your next video just 2% better, you will eventually find the greatness that is already inside of you.

✎ To get more details on all the research and studies mentioned in this video check out the articles below:
https://hbr.org/2014/10/the-value-of-keeping-the-right-customers
https://www.apa.org/monitor/2017/11/numbers
https://www.nimdzi.com/nimdzi-100-2022/
https://blog.marissapane.com/social-media-audience-connection/
https://medium.com/
https://lessonslearnedinlife.net/insp...
https://www.alexjhughes.com/blog/2019...
https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/bl...
https://solvingprocrastination.com/fear/
https://my.clevelandclinic.org/

⚑ SUBSCRIBE TO MY CHANNEL ⚑
If you want to do great things you need to have a great environment. Create one by subbing and watching daily.
